MOURINHO EXPLAINS MKHITARYAN ABSENCE
Jose Mourinho has explained why he has decided to leave Henrikh Mkhitaryan out of his Manchester United squad for recent matches.

The Armenian has not been involved in the matchday squad in seven of the last eight games and last featured as a substitute in United's 1-0 win over Brighton on 25 November.

Mourinho was asked about Mkhitaryan's absence in his post-match press conference following the Reds' 1-0 victory over Bournemouth at Old Trafford on Wednesday night.

The boss outlined that his plethora of options in midfield and attacking positions means that there is competition for every place in the starting line-up and on the bench.

He said: “I can only have six [outfield] players on the bench and I try to have some balance on the bench – I had two defenders and [Daley] Blind who can play in different areas. I had Ashley Young to cover me all of the wing and the wing-back position.

“I had [Ander] Herrera as a midfield player, Zlatan [Ibrahimovic] as a striker and Marcus [Rashford] as a second striker and winger. I played [Anthony] Martial, [Juan] Mata and [Jesse] Lingard in the team. To have Micki means that I don’t have one of them and, in this moment, I believe the other ones they deserve [the chance to play].”

Mkhitaryan will be working hard in a bid to return when the Reds return to action on Sunday in the Premier League against West Bromwich Albion at The Hawthorns (kick-off 14:15 GMT).

Manchester United manager Jose Mourinho is eyeing up Inter Milan attacking midfielder Joao Mario to replace Henrikh Mkhitaryan.

The Armenian winger has only played once since the start of November, with a 19-minute cameo at Brighton on November 25th being his most recent appearance.

Italian outlet ​Corriere dello Sport claim that Inter midfielder Joao Mario is being line-up up as a replacement for Mkhitaryan after the 28-year-old was dropped from the squad before the Manchester Derby.

Reports have suggested that the former Borussia Dortmund man has demanded talks with his boss over the snub.

Corriere dello Sport also add that he could be sent on loan to Inter for the rest of the season to tempt Inter to part ways with Mario.

The Italian club paid £40 million for Mario to move from Sporting in 2016, and would look to recoup that fee should he move to Manchester.

Despite his hefty price tag, the 24-year-old has seen himself relegated to the bench this season.

Manchester United aren’t the only top club monitoring Joao Mario’s situation, with Paris Saint-Germain and Arsenal also keeping tabs on the Portuguese international.

Pundit and former West Ham goalkeeper Shaka Hislop believes Arsenal should make a move for Mario as a replacement for contract rebel Mesut Ozil, with the German midfielder’s future still in doubt.

He told ESPN TV: “At only 24-years-old, this makes sense.

“A like-for-like swap positionally. As good as Mesut Ozil has been, I’m not sure he’s worth the money that he’s been asking for or was even on the table.

“I put this down as a hit, I think it makes sense for player and club. Both players and club.

“I think it makes sense, like-for-like swap.”

曼聯主帥摩連奴透露，拜利於國家隊服役期間弄傷足踝，屬於嚴重受傷。而拜利自十一月開始已再無為曼聯上陣，球會將會於幾天內決定是否需要開刀根治傷患。

摩連奴表示：「拜利的傷比較嚴重，我不知道要養傷多久。我們一直在嘗試採用一些保守治療，如果情況沒有好轉，他也許需要動手術來根治。」「我不是醫生，醫生才能夠告知你他要傷出多久。我們沒有甚麼需要隱瞞，但我不希望談論這個話題。」至於有記者問到拜利是否會因此收咧，摩佬說：「我不至於那麼悲觀。但我將這個問題留給醫生。」

【BBC、ESPN：米希達恩與摩連奴關係破裂，一月或被出售 | 體嘢報道】

ESPN權威記者Mark Ogden報導，曼聯中場米希達恩與領隊摩連奴關係決裂，他在曼聯的前途已經成疑。報道提及，二人上月在卡靈頓訓練場的視像分析環節出現衝突。與此同時BBC更透露，摩連奴在記者會上暗示米希達恩可以離隊。

近8場賽事裏，米希達恩有7場沒有被摩連奴列入大軍名單。Mark Ogden透露，他不滿摩連奴對於自己在白禮頓一役的表現所作的評估，並在卡靈頓分析室外的走廊與對方持續辯論。Mark Ogden更透露，摩連奴本來不滿米希達恩在前六大戰裏的比賽演出，但他在季初的表現一度讓前者改觀。之不過，在對車路士一戰裏米希達恩的表現讓摩連奴不甚滿意，使他只能退居後備。

BBC的報道指，摩連奴和米希達恩二人已失去互信。摩連奴在對西布朗的賽前記者會上說，任何球員都有「合適的價位」，並謂：「如果有球員不開心，我們又收到對他的報價並感到滿意，我不會說『不』（指把該球員出售）。」BBC更在同一篇報道裏提及梳爾有可能在一月離隊，縱使他上仗對般尼茅夫演出可人。

近日風傳摩連奴有意從阿仙奴收購中場奧斯爾，頂替米希達恩進攻中場的位置。而國際米蘭對於米希達恩亦有興趣，並願以祖奧馬里奧作為交易條件。

近日，華倫西亞體育總監阿勒文尼(Mateu Alemany)在接受採訪時表示希望中場小將佩雷拉能在球隊中至少踢到明年夏天，而不是在冬窗中返回曼聯。佩雷拉在今年夏天被曼聯租借到了華倫西亞，曼聯可以選擇在冬窗將他召回。


佩雷拉來到華倫西亞後已經為蝙蝠軍團在西甲中出場了13次，其中7次首發。

華倫西亞體育總監阿勒文尼在新聞發佈會中説道：“佩雷拉的未來取決於曼聯，他們最晚要在1月初做出決定。我們需要做好他離隊的準備，但目前我還沒有聽到曼聯要召回他的新聞，我們很高興能擁有他。”

上個賽季，佩雷拉被租借到了格蘭納達，他為球隊首發了34次，打進了5個進球。

曼聯主帥摩連奴曾表示他對於佩雷拉去華倫西亞踢球感到很失望，他認為巴西人應該留在奧脫福競爭主力位置。

佩雷拉本人在上個月表示他想在租借期結束後留在華倫西亞。
